accordion.title: Accordion
accordion.description: Expandable panels for displaying hierarchical content compactly. Ideal for FAQs, settings and filters.

props.items: List of items to render (each with value, title and content).
props.modelValue: v-model binding. Type depends on multiple.
props.multiple: Allows multiple panels to be open at the same time.
props.size: Padding and typography scale. Inherited from ModoProvider.
props.radius: Border radius (for separated and bordered).
props.iconPosition: Side where the chevron icon is shown.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the set of open panels changes.
emits.change: Alias of update:modelValue for use without v-model.

slots.itemValue: Per-item slot for rendering rich content (HTML, forms, lists).

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Three single-open panels with v-model.

multiple.title: Multiple open
multiple.desc: Allows keeping multiple panels expanded simultaneously.

variants.title: Variants
variants.desc: separated (independent cards), bordered (single box) and flush (no container).

icons.title: With icons
icons.desc: Each item can declare an optional icon next to its title.

types.title: Accordion
types.desc: TypeScript interfaces for Accordion and AccordionItem. Supports single/multiple expansion, variants, sizes and custom icons.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next accordion header
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous accordion header
a11y.kbEnter: Expand or collapse the focused accordion panel
a11y.kbEsc: Collapses the expanded panel when focus is on the header
a11y.ariaRegion: Uses role region for screen reader identification
a11y.ariaExpanded: Announces whether the panel is expanded or collapsed
a11y.ariaControls: Links the header to the panel it controls
a11y.focusNative: Accordion headers are focusable and keyboard-activatable

agendaView.title: AgendaView
agendaView.description: Chronological list of events per day. Ideal for "upcoming events" sections, dashboards and compact agendas.

props.modelValue: Anchor date from which the range is calculated.
props.locale: BCP-47 locale for dates and day names.
props.color: Semantic color applied to accents.
props.daysToShow: Number of days ahead to show.
props.daysBefore: Days before the anchor date to include.
props.showEmptyDays: Shows days without events as empty rows.
props.showMonthSeparator: Inserts a separator when the month changes.
props.emptyText: Text shown when there are no events in the range.
props.bordered: Draws a border around the container.
props.loadMoreChunk: Number of days added when loading more events.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the visible range changes.
emits.loadMore: Request to load more days at the end of the list.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: List of the next 7 days grouped by day.

extendedRange.title: Extended range
extendedRange.desc: Increase days-to-show to display more days ahead.

emptyState.title: Empty state
emptyState.desc: When there are no events, shows a configurable message.

format12h.title: 12-hour format
format12h.desc: Shows event times in AM/PM format.

types.title: AgendaView
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the AgendaView component props. Supports modelValue, events, locale, color, radius, bordered, minDate, maxDate, daysToShow, daysBefore, showEmptyDays, showHeader, showMonthSeparator, format, emptyText, highlightedDates, disabledDates, disabledWeekdays and loadMoreChunk.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the agenda view
a11y.focusNative: Focus is managed by the agenda view; use Tab to navigate events and actions

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.description: User avatar with image, initials fallback, status indicator and multiple sizes and shapes.

props.src: URL of the avatar image. Falls back to initials or icon if it fails.
props.initials: Initials shown when no image is available.
props.radius: Shape of the avatar. full=circle, none=square.
props.color: Background color when initials are shown.
props.status: Status indicator visible at the bottom corner.
props.bordered: Adds a border around the avatar.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible name when initials or the fallback icon are shown.
props.skeleton: Shows a loading placeholder with the same footprint.

image.title: Image
image.desc: Loads the image from a URL.

initials.title: Initials
initials.desc: Fallback with initials and semantic color when there is no image.

iconFallback.title: Icon fallback
iconFallback.desc: If there is no src or initials, a generic icon is shown.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Five scales: xs, small, medium, large and xl.

status.title: Status indicator
status.desc: Dot at the bottom-right corner to signal presence.

types.title: Avatar
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the Avatar component props. Supports src, alt, initials, size, radius, status, bordered, color, ariaLabel and skeleton.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the avatar image
a11y.ariaImg: Uses role img for screen reader identification
a11y.focusNative: Non-interactive by default; does not capture focus

avatarGroup.title: AvatarGroup
avatarGroup.description: Stacks overlapping avatars showing up to N visible and a counter for the rest. Ideal for collaborator, assignee or member lists.

props.max: Maximum number of visible avatars. The rest are grouped in a +N counter.
props.size: Size applied to all child avatars.
props.radius: Shape shared by all avatars in the group.
props.bordered: Border around each avatar to visually separate them.

slots.default: List of Avatar components. The group controls their size and shape.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Three overlapping avatars without a limit.

maxOverflow.title: With max and overflow
maxOverflow.desc: Limits visible avatars and shows a +N counter for the rest.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: The size is applied to all child avatars.

mixed.title: Mixed
mixed.desc: Combines images, initials and icon fallback in the same group.

types.title: AvatarGroup
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the AvatarGroup component props. Supports max, size, radius, bordered and ariaLabel.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name describing the group of avatars
a11y.focusNative: Non-interactive container; child avatars are not focusable

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Monthly calendar for selecting a date. Supports minDate, maxDate, disabled dates, locale and visual variants.

props.month: Initial month shown (0-11). Defaults to current month.
props.locale: BCP-47 locale for month and day names.
props.firstDayOfWeek: First day of the week (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday).
props.color: Semantic color applied to the selection and hover.
props.radius: Border radius for the calendar and cells.
props.showOutsideDays: Shows days from the previous and next month that complete the grid.
props.showHeader: Shows the header with month and year navigation.
props.fixedWeeks: Always shows 6 weeks to maintain a constant height.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when a date is selected.
emits.monthChange: Emitted when the visible month or year changes via navigation.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Default calendar bound to a date via v-model.

minMax.title: Min / Max date
minMax.desc: Limits the selectable range using min-date and max-date.

dateRange.title: With date range
dateRange.desc: Limits the selectable range using min-date and max-date.

outline.title: Outline variant
outline.desc: Variant with a visible border and large radius.

locale.title: Custom locale
locale.desc: Changes the locale and the first day of the week.

types.title: Calendar
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the Calendar component props. Supports modelValue, locale, firstDayOfWeek, minDate, maxDate, disabledDates, color, variant, radius, showOutsideDays, showHeader and fixedWeeks.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the calendar
a11y.focusNative: Focus is managed by the calendar; use Tab to navigate days and actions

card.title: Card
card.description: Structural container with three variants (elevated, outlined, filled), padding control, border radius and hover state. Base block for metrics, lists, forms and sections.

playground.title: Example card
playground.body: Adjust the controls to see live changes.

props.padding: Internal padding applied to header, body and footer.
props.radius: Border radius. Inherited from ModoProvider if omitted.
props.hoverable: Applies hover state (shadow, border) without converting it to a button.
props.clickable: Renders the card as a button with accessible focus and pointer cursor.
props.divided: Shows a dividing line between header / body / footer.

slots.image: Padding-free slot for edge-to-edge images or media.
slots.footer: Optional footer for actions or metadata.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Simple card with title and description.

headerFooter.title: With header and footer
headerFooter.desc: #header and #footer slots with a divider between sections.

hover.title: Hover effect
hover.desc: Enable hoverable to highlight the card on cursor hover.

clickable.title: Clickable
clickable.desc: Renders the card as an accessible button with visible focus.

types.title: Card
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the Card component props. Supports variant, padding, radius, hoverable, clickable and divided.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element inside the card
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element inside the card
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for clickable cards
a11y.focusNative: Interactive content inside the card is focusable; the card itself is not unless clickable is set

code.title: Code
code.description: Inline code snippets for highlighting values, props or errors in docs and messages.

props.variant: Visual style of the background / border.
props.color: Semantic color applied to the snippet.
props.radius: Border radius. Inherited from ModoProvider if omitted.

slots.default: Content of the code snippet (plain text or short expression).

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Inline code snippet with default styles.

colors.title: Semantic colors
colors.desc: Five colors to differentiate values, errors or states.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three scales that align with the surrounding text.

types.title: Code
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the Code component props. Supports size, variant, color and radius.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the code snippet
a11y.focusNative: Non-interactive element; does not participate in the tab order

dateRangePicker.title: DateRangePicker
dateRangePicker.description: Inline date range selector. Supports one or two visible months, quick presets, min/max length restrictions and disabled dates.

props.modelValue: Tuple with the start and end dates of the range (v-model).
props.showPresets: Shows the side panel with predefined ranges (today, this week, etc.).
props.presets: Custom presets. Each has a label and a range() function that returns the tuple.
props.color: Accent color for the selected range.
props.radius: Border radius of the panel.
props.minRange: Minimum number of days the range must span.
props.maxRange: Maximum number of days the range can span.
props.locale: Locale for month and day names.

twoMonths.title: Two months (default)
twoMonths.desc: Shows two calendars side by side for comfortably selecting long ranges.

oneMonth.title: One month
oneMonth.desc: Compact mode with a single calendar, ideal for short ranges.

presets.title: With presets
presets.desc: show-presets adds a side panel with shortcuts (today, this week, this month, last 30 days…).

color.title: Primary color
color.desc: The color affects the background of the selected range and the start/end days.

colorPrimary.title: Primary color
colorPrimary.desc: The color affects the background of the selected range and the start/end days.

outline.title: Outline variant
outline.desc: Visible perimeter border, useful on neutral backgrounds.

types.title: DateRangePicker
types.desc: TypeScript interfaces for DateRangePicker and RangePreset. Supports modelValue, locale, firstDayOfWeek, minDate, maxDate, disabledDates, color, variant, radius, months, showPresets, presets, minRange and maxRange.

dateTimePicker.title: DateTimePicker
dateTimePicker.description: Inline date and time selector. Shows a monthly calendar alongside scrollable time columns. Supports 12/24h formats, seconds and minute step.

props.format: Time format of the time selector.
props.step: Minute increment for the minutes column.
props.color: Accent color for the selected day.
props.variant: Visual style of the calendar panel.
props.radius: Border radius of the panel.
props.locale: Locale for month and day names (e.g. en-US).

basic24.title: 24h (default)
basic24.desc: 24-hour mode with hour and minute columns.

basic24h.title: 24h (default)
basic24h.desc: 24-hour mode with hour and minute columns.

format12.title: 12h format
format12.desc: Adds the AM/PM column for regions that prefer the 12-hour clock.

format12h.title: 12h format
format12h.desc: Adds the AM/PM column for regions that prefer the 12-hour clock.

seconds.title: 12h with seconds
seconds.desc: Enable show-seconds to show the seconds column.

seconds12h.title: 12h with seconds
seconds12h.desc: Enable show-seconds to show the seconds column.

step.title: 15-minute step
step.desc: step="15" groups minutes in 15-unit increments, ideal for schedules.

step15.title: 15-minute step
step15.desc: step="15" groups minutes in 15-unit increments, ideal for schedules.

outline.title: Outline variant
outline.desc: Perimeter border for neutral backgrounds or cards.

types.title: DateTimePicker
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the DateTimePicker component props. Supports modelValue, locale, firstDayOfWeek, minDate, maxDate, disabledDates, color, variant, radius, format, step, showSeconds, minTime and maxTime.

dayView.title: DayView
dayView.description: Single-day view with an hourly grid. Ideal for detailed agendas, time blocks and operational planning.

props.events: Events to render in the hourly grid.
props.locale: BCP-47 locale for headers and formats.
props.color: Semantic color applied to accents.
props.format: Time format for the hour column.
props.slotHeight: Height in px of each time slot.
props.showAllDayRow: Shows the top row for all-day events.
props.showNowPill: Shows a pill with the current time.
props.bordered: Draws a border around the grid.
props.allowRangeSelection: Allows selecting a range by dragging over empty slots.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the visible day changes.
emits.eventDrop: Event dragged to a new position.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Default day with no events.

events.title: With events
events.desc: Timed events rendered in the hourly grid.

businessHours.title: Business hours
businessHours.desc: Highlights business hours and restricts the visible time range.

types.title: DayView
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the DayView component props. Supports modelValue, events, locale, color, radius, bordered, minDate, maxDate, businessHours, disabledTimeRanges, showHeader, showCurrentTime, format, slotMinutes, slotHeight, hourStart, hourEnd, showAllDayRow, draggableEvents, resizableEvents and allowRangeSelection.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the day view
a11y.focusNative: Focus is managed by the day view; use Tab to navigate events and actions

kbd.title: Kbd
kbd.description: Visual representation of keyboard keys or shortcuts. Useful in docs, tooltips and command palettes.

props.radius: Border radius. Inherited from ModoProvider if omitted.

slots.default: Text or glyph of the key (Enter, ⌘, ↑, etc.).

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: A single key.

combo.title: Combination
combo.desc: Join multiple Kbd components with a separator.

variants.title: Variants
variants.desc: Three visual styles: subtle (default), outline and solid.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three scales to align with text in different contexts.

types.title: Kbd
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the Kbd component props. Supports size, variant and radius.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name describing the keyboard shortcut
a11y.focusNative: Non-interactive element; does not participate in the tab order

monthView.title: MonthView
monthView.description: Grid-style monthly view for displaying events per day. Supports week numbers, any first day of week and event drag-and-drop.

props.modelValue: Visible date (v-model). Determines the displayed month.
props.events: List of events to render in each cell.
props.locale: BCP-47 locale for month and day names.
props.firstDayOfWeek: First day of the week (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday).
props.color: Semantic color for selection and accents.
props.radius: Border radius of the container.
props.maxEventsPerDay: Maximum visible events per cell; the rest are grouped as "+N".
props.showWeekNumbers: Shows a leading column with the ISO week number.
props.fixedWeeks: Always renders 6 weeks to maintain a constant height.
props.showOutsideDays: Shows days from the previous and next months.
props.minDateMaxDate: Limits the range of selectable dates.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when a day is selected.
emits.eventClick: Emitted when clicking on an event.
emits.dayClick: Emitted when clicking on a day cell.
emits.eventDrop: Emitted when an event is dropped on another date.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Monthly view without events bound to a date.

events.title: With events
events.desc: Renders a collection of CalendarEvents distributed per day.

weekNumbers.title: With week numbers
weekNumbers.desc: Enable show-week-numbers to display ISO numbering.

sundayStart.title: Week starting on Sunday
sundayStart.desc: Set first-day-of-week=0 to start on Sunday.

types.title: MonthView
types.desc: TypeScript interfaces for MonthView and CalendarEvent. Supports modelValue, events, locale, firstDayOfWeek, color, radius, maxEventsPerDay, showWeekNumbers, fixedWeeks, showOutsideDays, showHeader, bordered, highlightWeekends, minDate, maxDate, disabledDates, disabledDaysOfWeek and draggableEvents.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the month view
a11y.focusNative: Focus is managed by the month view; use Tab to navigate days and events

scheduler.title: Scheduler
scheduler.description: Agenda-style view with resources as columns (rooms, people, teams). Each resource shows its events on a shared hourly grid.

props.locale: BCP-47 locale for dates and times.
props.color: Semantic color applied to accents.
props.format: Time format for the hour column.
props.slotHeight: Height in px of each time slot.
props.minResourceWidth: Minimum width of each resource column before horizontal scroll.
props.resourceHeaderHeight: Height in px of the resource header.
props.showAllDayRow: Shows the row for all-day events.
props.bordered: Draws a border around the grid.
props.useResourceColor: Applies the resource color to its events when they have no own color.
props.allowCrossResourceDrag: Allows moving events between resources by dragging.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the visible day changes.
emits.slotClick: Click on an empty slot of a resource.
emits.eventDrop: Event dragged to another position or resource.

basic.title: Resources only
basic.desc: Empty scheduler showing the resource grid with no events.

events.title: With events
events.desc: Events assigned to each resource by resourceId.

format12h.title: 12-hour format
format12h.desc: Switches the hour column to AM/PM format.

businessHours.title: Business hours
businessHours.desc: Highlights business hours and limits the visible time range.

types.title: Scheduler
types.desc: TypeScript interfaces for Scheduler, SchedulerResource and SchedulerEvent. Supports modelValue, resources, events, locale, color, radius, bordered, businessHours, disabledTimeRanges, showHeader, showCurrentTime, format, slotMinutes, slotHeight, minResourceWidth, showAllDayRow, draggableEvents, resizableEvents, allowCrossResourceDrag and useResourceColor.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the scheduler
a11y.focusNative: Focus is managed by the scheduler; use Tab to navigate resources, events and actions

stat.title: Stat
stat.description: Compact KPI card for displaying metrics with trend, icon and semantic color. Ideal for dashboards and summaries.

props.label: Short metric label ("Revenue", "Users").
props.value: Main value pre-formatted by the consumer.
props.description: Auxiliary text shown below the value.
props.trend: Trend metadata. Renders an arrow and the delta.
props.color: Semantic color applied to the icon and trend.
props.size: Size scale. Inherited from ModoProvider if omitted.
props.loading: Shows a skeleton on the value while loading.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Label and main value with no extras.

trend.title: With trend
trend.desc: The trend prop shows an arrow and the percentage delta.

icon.title: With icon and color
icon.desc: Combines icon, semantic color and the outlined variant.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three scales to align with the page hierarchy.

grid.title: Metrics grid
grid.desc: Four Stat cards in a grid simulating a dashboard.

types.title: Stat
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the Stat component props. Supports label, value, description, icon, trend, variant, color, size and loading.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the stat value
a11y.focusNative: Non-interactive element; does not participate in the tab order

table.title: Table
table.description: Powerful table with sorting, pagination, selection, sticky header, expandable rows and tree support. Columns are defined with key + accessor.

props.columns: Column definitions (key, header, accessor, sortable, align…).
props.rowKey: Unique row identifier used by v-for and selection.
props.size: Font size and base row height.
props.striped: Applies an alternating background to even rows.
props.hover: Highlights the row under the cursor.
props.stickyHeader: Keeps the header visible while scrolling vertically.
props.radius: Rounds the outer corners of the table container.
props.overflow: Controls how cells handle content that exceeds their width.
props.loading: Shows a loading state while data is being fetched.
props.loadingRows: Number of skeleton rows shown when loading is true.
props.loadingMode: Render strategy for the loading state: skeleton rows or an overlay spinner.
props.emptyText: Message displayed when data is empty.
props.noResultsText: Message displayed when filters yield no results.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible label for the table element.
props.sort: Controlled sort state: array of \{ key, direction \} objects.
props.multiSort: Allows sorting by multiple columns simultaneously.
props.sortClearable: Whether clicking a sorted column a third time clears its sort.
props.selectable: Enables row selection. 'single' allows one row; 'multi' allows many.
props.selected: Controlled array of selected row keys.
props.isRowSelectable: Predicate to disable selection on specific rows.
props.filter: Controlled per-column filter values as a key → value map.
props.filterRow: Shows an inline filter input row below the header.
props.expandable: Adds an expand toggle to each row to reveal additional content.
props.expanded: Controlled array of expanded row keys.
props.isRowExpandable: Predicate to hide the expand toggle on specific rows.
props.pagination: Controlled pagination state: \{ page, pageSize, total \}.
props.pageSizeOptions: Options available in the page-size selector.
props.serverSide: Disables client-side sorting/filtering; delegates to the server via emits.
props.resizable: Allows column widths to be dragged to resize.
props.reorderable: Allows columns to be dragged to reorder.
props.state: Full serializable snapshot of sort, filter, pagination and column state.
props.minColumnWidth: Minimum column width in pixels when resizing.
props.virtual: Enables virtual scrolling for large datasets.
props.rowHeight: Fixed row height in pixels required for virtual scrolling.
props.overscan: Number of rows rendered outside the visible area for virtual scrolling.
props.virtualHeight: Container height used when virtual is true.
props.tree: Enables tree mode: child rows are read from the childrenKey property.
props.childrenKey: Property name that holds child rows in tree mode.
props.treeExpanded: Controlled array of expanded tree node keys.
props.loadChildren: Async function that loads children on demand for a given row.
props.hasChildrenHint: Predicate that indicates a row may have children before they are loaded.
props.groupBy: Groups rows by the given key or accessor function.
props.groupExpanded: Controlled array of expanded group keys.
props.stickyFirstColumn: Pins the first column while scrolling horizontally.
props.toolbar: Shows the built-in toolbar with search and column controls.
props.globalSearch: Enables a global search input in the toolbar.
props.globalSearchScope: Whether global search runs on all columns or only filterable ones.
props.globalSearchTerm: Controlled value of the global search input.
props.columnVisibility: Adds a column visibility toggle to the toolbar.
props.exportable: Adds export buttons (CSV, JSON, clipboard) to the toolbar.
props.exportFileName: Base file name used when exporting CSV or JSON.

emits.updateSort: Emitted when column sort order changes. Payload: TableSortState.
emits.updateSelected: Emitted when row selection changes. Payload: (string | number)[].
emits.updateFilter: Emitted when a column filter changes. Payload: TableFilterState.
emits.updateExpanded: Emitted when expandable rows are toggled. Payload: (string | number)[].
emits.updatePagination: Emitted when the page or page size changes. Payload: TablePaginationState.
emits.updateColumnsState: Emitted when columns are resized or reordered. Payload: TableColumnState[].
emits.updateTreeExpanded: Emitted when tree nodes are expanded or collapsed. Payload: (string | number)[].
emits.updateGroupExpanded: Emitted when groups are expanded or collapsed. Payload: (string | number)[].
emits.updateGlobalSearchTerm: Emitted when the global search input changes. Payload: string.
emits.rowActivate: Emitted when a row is activated via Enter or double-click.
emits.rowClick: Emitted when a row is clicked.
emits.cellEdit: Emitted when an editable cell value is committed. Payload: TableCellEditEvent.
emits.cellEditCancel: Emitted when an editable cell edit is cancelled.
emits.updateState: Emitted with a full snapshot of all table state.

slots.default: Fallback slot — currently unused, reserved for future extensions.
slots.caption: Accessible table caption rendered as a caption element.
slots.empty: Custom content shown when data is empty. Exposes { message }.
slots.noResults: Custom content shown when filters yield no results. Exposes \{ message, clear \}.
slots.footer: Content appended below the table body.
slots.toolbar: Custom toolbar content. Exposes \{ searchTerm, setSearchTerm, clearSearch \}.
slots.bulkActions: Shown in the toolbar when rows are selected. Exposes \{ selected, rows, count, clear \}.
slots.rowExpanded: Content inside an expanded row. Exposes \{ row, index \}.
slots.groupHeader: Custom group header. Exposes \{ value, rows, count, expanded, toggle, aggregations \}.
slots.cellKey: Custom cell renderer for the column with the given key. Exposes \{ row, value, index \}.
slots.headerKey: Custom header renderer for the column with the given key. Exposes \{ column \}.
slots.filterKey: Custom filter input for the column with the given key. Exposes \{ column, value, setValue, clear \}.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Default configuration with four columns and standard typography.

striped.title: Striped + bordered
striped.desc: Alternating rows and full borders for easier reading in dense tables.

sort.title: With sorting
sort.desc: Mark any column as sortable to enable ascending / descending order.

compact.title: Compact density
compact.desc: Reduces vertical padding to show more rows in less space.

stickyHeader.title: Sticky header
stickyHeader.desc: The header stays fixed while scrolling inside the container.

selection.title: Row selection
selection.desc: Enable single or multi-row selection with checkboxes. Bind :selected and listen to \@update:selected.

pagination.title: Pagination
pagination.desc: Pass a pagination object with page, pageSize and total to split the data across pages.

loading.title: Loading state
loading.desc: Set :loading="true" to show skeleton rows while data is being fetched. Use loading-rows to control how many appear.

customCell.title: Custom cell slot
customCell.desc: Use the #cell-{key} slot to render any content inside a column. The slot exposes \{ row, value, index \}.

types.title: TypeScript interfaces
types.desc: Core types exported by Table: TableColumn, TableSortState, TableFilterState, TablePaginationState, TableCellEditEvent and TableColumnState.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element (sortable header, checkbox or pagination control)
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.kbEnter: Activate a sortable header (cycle asc → desc → none) or confirm an editable cell
a11y.kbSpace: Toggle selection on a focused row checkbox
a11y.ariaSort: Set to 'ascending' or 'descending' on active sort headers; 'none' on sortable but unsorted columns
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the table element
a11y.ariaSelected: Set to 'true' on selected rows when selectable is enabled
a11y.focusNative: Focus is managed natively; use Tab to navigate between headers, checkboxes and pagination controls
a11y.focusTrap: Editable cells trap focus until the edit is committed or cancelled

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.description: Vertical timeline for displaying events in chronological order. Useful for history, changelogs, tracking and activity feeds.

props.items: Events to render in chronological order.
props.variant: Default marker style. Each item can override it.
props.color: Default semantic color for the marker.
props.size: Visual scale of the marker and typography.
props.side: Side where the marker rail is rendered.

slots.itemId: Extra content rendered below the title and description of the item with the corresponding id.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Simple list of events with title and timestamp.

icons.title: With icons
icons.desc: Each item defines an icon component and variant 'icon'.

colors.title: Per-event colors
colors.desc: The marker color can be overridden per item to reflect states.

description.title: With description
description.desc: Adds secondary text below the title to give context to the event.

rightSide.title: Right side
rightSide.desc: Rail inverted with side='right' — useful for asymmetric layouts.

types.title: Timeline
types.desc: TypeScript interfaces for Timeline and TimelineItem. Supports items, color, side, size, variant and per-item icon overrides.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name describing the timeline content
a11y.focusNative: Non-interactive element; does not participate in the tab order

typography.title: Typography
typography.description: Typographic system with semantic variants (display, heading, title, body, caption…), sizes and weights. The as prop lets you map to the appropriate HTML tag to maintain accessible hierarchy.

props.variant: Semantic typographic style. Defines the default tag.
props.size: Scale within the variant. Inherited from ModoProvider if omitted.
props.as: Overrides the HTML tag inferred by the variant.
props.color: Semantic color applied to the text.
props.truncate: Truncates with ellipsis to a single line.

variants.title: Variants
variants.desc: Each variant defines a visual hierarchy and a default HTML tag.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Each variant has three scales (small, medium, large).

weights.title: Weights
weights.desc: Six weights available from light to extrabold.

colors.title: Semantic colors
colors.desc: Use provider colors to maintain consistency and accessibility.

truncate.title: Truncate
truncate.desc: Truncates the text to a single line with ellipsis when it exceeds the width.

types.title: Typography
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the Typography component props. Supports variant, size, as, weight, align, color, truncate, italic, underline and strikethrough.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaHidden: Decorative text can be hidden from screen readers
a11y.focusNative: Text is not interactive; does not participate in the tab order

weekView.title: WeekView
weekView.description: Weekly view with an hourly grid. Supports business hours, disabled ranges, drag & drop and event resizing.

props.modelValue: Visible date. The week is calculated from it.
props.events: Events to render in the hourly grid.
props.locale: BCP-47 locale for headers and formats.
props.color: Semantic color applied to accents.
props.format: Time format for the hour column.
props.slotHeight: Height in px of each time slot.
props.minDayWidth: Minimum width per day column before horizontal scroll.
props.showAllDayRow: Shows the row for all-day events.
props.showNowPill: Shows a pill with the current time over the day column.
props.bordered: Draws a border around the grid.
props.allowRangeSelection: Allows selecting a range by dragging over empty slots.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the visible week changes.
emits.eventDrop: Event dragged to a new position.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Week in 24-hour format with timed events.

allDay.title: With all-day row
allDay.desc: The top row groups all-day and multi-day events.

format12h.title: 12-hour format
format12h.desc: Switches the time format to AM/PM.

businessHours.title: Business hours
businessHours.desc: Highlights business hours and limits the visible time range.

types.title: WeekView
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the WeekView component props. Supports modelValue, events, locale, firstDayOfWeek, color, radius, bordered, minDate, maxDate, businessHours, disabledTimeRanges, showHeader, showCurrentTime, format, slotMinutes, slotHeight, minDayWidth, showAllDayRow, draggableEvents, resizableEvents and allowRangeSelection.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the week view
a11y.focusNative: Focus is managed by the week view; use Tab to navigate events and actions

accordion.title: Accordion
accordion.description: Expandable panels for displaying hierarchical content compactly. Ideal for FAQs, settings and filters.

props.items: List of items to render (each with value, title and content).
props.modelValue: v-model binding. Type depends on multiple.
props.multiple: Allows multiple panels to be open at the same time.
props.size: Padding and typography scale. Inherited from ModoProvider.
props.radius: Border radius (for separated and bordered).
props.iconPosition: Side where the chevron icon is shown.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the set of open panels changes.
emits.change: Alias of update:modelValue for use without v-model.

slots.itemValue: Per-item slot for rendering rich content (HTML, forms, lists).

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Three single-open panels with v-model.

multiple.title: Multiple open
multiple.desc: Allows keeping multiple panels expanded simultaneously.

variants.title: Variants
variants.desc: separated (independent cards), bordered (single box) and flush (no container).

icons.title: With icons
icons.desc: Each item can declare an optional icon next to its title.

agendaView.title: AgendaView
agendaView.description: Chronological list of events per day. Ideal for "upcoming events" sections, dashboards and compact agendas.

props.modelValue: Anchor date from which the range is calculated.
props.locale: BCP-47 locale for dates and day names.
props.color: Semantic color applied to accents.
props.daysToShow: Number of days ahead to show.
props.daysBefore: Days before the anchor date to include.
props.showEmptyDays: Shows days without events as empty rows.
props.showMonthSeparator: Inserts a separator when the month changes.
props.emptyText: Text shown when there are no events in the range.
props.bordered: Draws a border around the container.
props.loadMoreChunk: Number of days added when loading more events.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the visible range changes.
emits.loadMore: Request to load more days at the end of the list.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: List of the next 7 days grouped by day.

extendedRange.title: Extended range
extendedRange.desc: Increase days-to-show to display more days ahead.

emptyState.title: Empty state
emptyState.desc: When there are no events, shows a configurable message.

format12h.title: 12-hour format
format12h.desc: Shows event times in AM/PM format.

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.description: User avatar with image, initials fallback, status indicator and multiple sizes and shapes.

props.src: URL of the avatar image. Falls back to initials or icon if it fails.
props.initials: Initials shown when no image is available.
props.radius: Shape of the avatar. full=circle, none=square.
props.color: Background color when initials are shown.
props.status: Status indicator visible at the bottom corner.
props.bordered: Adds a border around the avatar.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible name when initials or the fallback icon are shown.
props.skeleton: Shows a loading placeholder with the same footprint.

image.title: Image
image.desc: Loads the image from a URL.

initials.title: Initials
initials.desc: Fallback with initials and semantic color when there is no image.

iconFallback.title: Icon fallback
iconFallback.desc: If there is no src or initials, a generic icon is shown.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Five scales: xs, small, medium, large and xl.

status.title: Status indicator
status.desc: Dot at the bottom-right corner to signal presence.

avatarGroup.title: AvatarGroup
avatarGroup.description: Stacks overlapping avatars showing up to N visible and a counter for the rest. Ideal for collaborator, assignee or member lists.

props.max: Maximum number of visible avatars. The rest are grouped in a +N counter.
props.size: Size applied to all child avatars.
props.radius: Shape shared by all avatars in the group.
props.bordered: Border around each avatar to visually separate them.

slots.default: List of Avatar components. The group controls their size and shape.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Three overlapping avatars without a limit.

max.title: With max and overflow
max.desc: Limits visible avatars and shows a +N counter for the rest.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: The size is applied to all child avatars.

mixed.title: Mixed
mixed.desc: Combines images, initials and icon fallback in the same group.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Monthly calendar for selecting a date. Supports minDate, maxDate, disabled dates, locale and visual variants.

props.month: Initial month shown (0-11). Defaults to current month.
props.locale: BCP-47 locale for month and day names.
props.firstDayOfWeek: First day of the week (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday).
props.color: Semantic color applied to the selection and hover.
props.radius: Border radius for the calendar and cells.
props.showOutsideDays: Shows days from the previous and next month that complete the grid.
props.showHeader: Shows the header with month and year navigation.
props.fixedWeeks: Always shows 6 weeks to maintain a constant height.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when a date is selected.
emits.monthChange: Emitted when the visible month or year changes via navigation.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Default calendar bound to a date via v-model.

minMax.title: With date range
minMax.desc: Limits the selectable range using min-date and max-date.

outline.title: Outline variant
outline.desc: Variant with a visible border and large radius.

locale.title: Custom locale
locale.desc: Changes the locale and the first day of the week.

card.title: Card
card.description: Structural container with three variants (elevated, outlined, filled), padding control, border radius and hover state. Base block for metrics, lists, forms and sections.

playground.title: Example card
playground.body: Adjust the controls to see live changes.

props.padding: Internal padding applied to header, body and footer.
props.radius: Border radius. Inherited from ModoProvider if omitted.
props.hoverable: Applies hover state (shadow, border) without converting it to a button.
props.clickable: Renders the card as a button with accessible focus and pointer cursor.
props.divided: Shows a dividing line between header / body / footer.

slots.image: Padding-free slot for edge-to-edge images or media.
slots.footer: Optional footer for actions or metadata.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Simple card with title and description.

headerFooter.title: With header and footer
headerFooter.desc: #header and #footer slots with a divider between sections.

hover.title: Hover effect
hover.desc: Enable hoverable to highlight the card on cursor hover.

clickable.title: Clickable
clickable.desc: Renders the card as an accessible button with visible focus.

code.title: Code
code.description: Inline code snippets for highlighting values, props or errors in docs and messages.

props.variant: Visual style of the background / border.
props.color: Semantic color applied to the snippet.
props.radius: Border radius. Inherited from ModoProvider if omitted.

slots.default: Content of the code snippet (plain text or short expression).

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Inline code snippet with default styles.

colors.title: Semantic colors
colors.desc: Five colors to differentiate values, errors or states.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three scales that align with the surrounding text.

dateRangePicker.title: DateRangePicker
dateRangePicker.description: Inline date range selector. Supports one or two visible months, quick presets, min/max length restrictions and disabled dates.

props.modelValue: Tuple with the start and end dates of the range (v-model).
props.showPresets: Shows the side panel with predefined ranges (today, this week, etc.).
props.presets: Custom presets. Each has a label and a range() function that returns the tuple.
props.color: Accent color for the selected range.
props.radius: Border radius of the panel.
props.minRange: Minimum number of days the range must span.
props.maxRange: Maximum number of days the range can span.
props.locale: Locale for month and day names.

twoMonths.title: Two months (default)
twoMonths.desc: Shows two calendars side by side for comfortably selecting long ranges.

oneMonth.title: One month
oneMonth.desc: Compact mode with a single calendar, ideal for short ranges.

presets.title: With presets
presets.desc: show-presets adds a side panel with shortcuts (today, this week, this month, last 30 days…).

colorPrimary.title: Primary color
colorPrimary.desc: The color affects the background of the selected range and the start/end days.

outline.title: Outline variant
outline.desc: Visible perimeter border, useful on neutral backgrounds.

dateTimePicker.title: DateTimePicker
dateTimePicker.description: Inline date and time selector. Shows a monthly calendar alongside scrollable time columns. Supports 12/24h formats, seconds and minute step.

props.format: Time format of the time selector.
props.step: Minute increment for the minutes column.
props.color: Accent color for the selected day.
props.variant: Visual style of the calendar panel.
props.radius: Border radius of the panel.
props.locale: Locale for month and day names (e.g. en-US).

basic24h.title: 24h (default)
basic24h.desc: 24-hour mode with hour and minute columns.

format12h.title: 12h format
format12h.desc: Adds the AM/PM column for regions that prefer the 12-hour clock.

seconds12h.title: 12h with seconds
seconds12h.desc: Enable show-seconds to show the seconds column.

step15.title: 15-minute step
step15.desc: step="15" groups minutes in 15-unit increments, ideal for schedules.

outline.title: Outline variant
outline.desc: Perimeter border for neutral backgrounds or cards.

dayView.title: DayView
dayView.description: Single-day view with an hourly grid. Ideal for detailed agendas, time blocks and operational planning.

props.events: Events to render in the hourly grid.
props.locale: BCP-47 locale for headers and formats.
props.color: Semantic color applied to accents.
props.format: Time format for the hour column.
props.slotHeight: Height in px of each time slot.
props.showAllDayRow: Shows the top row for all-day events.
props.showNowPill: Shows a pill with the current time.
props.bordered: Draws a border around the grid.
props.allowRangeSelection: Allows selecting a range by dragging over empty slots.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the visible day changes.
emits.eventDrop: Event dragged to a new position.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Default day with no events.

events.title: With events
events.desc: Timed events rendered in the hourly grid.

businessHours.title: Business hours
businessHours.desc: Highlights business hours and restricts the visible time range.

kbd.title: Kbd
kbd.description: Visual representation of keyboard keys or shortcuts. Useful in docs, tooltips and command palettes.

props.radius: Border radius. Inherited from ModoProvider if omitted.

slots.default: Text or glyph of the key (Enter, ⌘, ↑, etc.).

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: A single key.

combo.title: Combination
combo.desc: Join multiple Kbd components with a separator.

variants.title: Variants
variants.desc: Three visual styles: subtle (default), outline and solid.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three scales to align with text in different contexts.

monthView.title: MonthView
monthView.description: Grid-style monthly view for displaying events per day. Supports week numbers, any first day of week and event drag-and-drop.

props.modelValue: Visible date (v-model). Determines the displayed month.
props.events: List of events to render in each cell.
props.locale: BCP-47 locale for month and day names.
props.firstDayOfWeek: First day of the week (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday).
props.color: Semantic color for selection and accents.
props.radius: Border radius of the container.
props.maxEventsPerDay: Maximum visible events per cell; the rest are grouped as "+N".
props.showWeekNumbers: Shows a leading column with the ISO week number.
props.fixedWeeks: Always renders 6 weeks to maintain a constant height.
props.showOutsideDays: Shows days from the previous and next months.
props.minDateMaxDate: Limits the range of selectable dates.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when a day is selected.
emits.eventClick: Emitted when clicking on an event.
emits.dayClick: Emitted when clicking on a day cell.
emits.eventDrop: Emitted when an event is dropped on another date.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Monthly view without events bound to a date.

events.title: With events
events.desc: Renders a collection of CalendarEvents distributed per day.

weekNumbers.title: With week numbers
weekNumbers.desc: Enable show-week-numbers to display ISO numbering.

sundayStart.title: Week starting on Sunday
sundayStart.desc: Set first-day-of-week=0 to start on Sunday.

scheduler.title: Scheduler
scheduler.description: Agenda-style view with resources as columns (rooms, people, teams). Each resource shows its events on a shared hourly grid.

props.locale: BCP-47 locale for dates and times.
props.color: Semantic color applied to accents.
props.format: Time format for the hour column.
props.slotHeight: Height in px of each time slot.
props.minResourceWidth: Minimum width of each resource column before horizontal scroll.
props.resourceHeaderHeight: Height in px of the resource header.
props.showAllDayRow: Shows the row for all-day events.
props.bordered: Draws a border around the grid.
props.useResourceColor: Applies the resource color to its events when they have no own color.
props.allowCrossResourceDrag: Allows moving events between resources by dragging.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the visible day changes.
emits.slotClick: Click on an empty slot of a resource.
emits.eventDrop: Event dragged to another position or resource.

basic.title: Resources only
basic.desc: Empty scheduler showing the resource grid with no events.

events.title: With events
events.desc: Events assigned to each resource by resourceId.

format12h.title: 12-hour format
format12h.desc: Switches the hour column to AM/PM format.

businessHours.title: Business hours
businessHours.desc: Highlights business hours and limits the visible time range.

stat.title: Stat
stat.description: Compact KPI card for displaying metrics with trend, icon and semantic color. Ideal for dashboards and summaries.

props.label: Short metric label ("Revenue", "Users").
props.value: Main value pre-formatted by the consumer.
props.description: Auxiliary text shown below the value.
props.trend: Trend metadata. Renders an arrow and the delta.
props.color: Semantic color applied to the icon and trend.
props.size: Size scale. Inherited from ModoProvider if omitted.
props.loading: Shows a skeleton on the value while loading.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Label and main value with no extras.

trend.title: With trend
trend.desc: The trend prop shows an arrow and the percentage delta.

icon.title: With icon and color
icon.desc: Combines icon, semantic color and the outlined variant.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three scales to align with the page hierarchy.

grid.title: Metrics grid
grid.desc: Four Stat cards in a grid simulating a dashboard.

table.title: Table
table.description: Powerful table with sorting, pagination, selection, sticky header, expandable rows, virtualization, toolbar actions and tree support. Rows provide the data; columns describe how each field is rendered.

props.data: Array of row objects rendered by the table. Each row can have any shape; use rowKey to identify it.
props.columns: Column definitions. Each column usually has a key, header, optional accessor, type, alignment, sorting/filtering metadata and layout options.
props.rowKey: Unique row identifier used for Vue keys, selection, expansion, tree state and other row-level state.
props.size: Component size scale. Controls font size and base row height.
props.density: Vertical density applied to cells: compact, comfortable or spacious.
props.striped: Applies alternating row backgrounds for readability.
props.hover: Highlights the row under the cursor.
props.bordered: Controls internal borders between rows, columns, both or none.
props.stickyHeader: Keeps the table header visible while the table body scrolls.
props.radius: Overrides the wrapper radius. Falls back to the active ModoProvider radius when omitted.
props.overflow: Horizontal overflow strategy. Use scroll for wide tables or truncate for ellipsis-based layouts.
props.loading: Shows loading UI in the table body.
props.loadingRows: Number of skeleton rows to render while loading.
props.loadingMode: skeleton replaces rows; overlay keeps existing rows visible under a loading overlay.
props.emptyText: Custom message shown when there is no data.
props.noResultsText: Custom message shown when filters/search produce no results.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible label forwarded to the native table element.
props.sort: Controlled sort state. Bind with v-model:sort.
props.sortClearable: Allows the sort cycle to clear back to no sort.
props.selectable: Selection mode: none, single or multi.
props.selected: Controlled selected row keys. Bind with v-model:selected.
props.isRowSelectable: Predicate used to disable selection for specific rows.
props.filter: Controlled column filter state. Keys match column keys.
props.filterRow: Renders a filter input row under the header for filterable columns.
props.expandable: Adds row expansion controls and enables the row-expanded slot.
props.expanded: Controlled expanded row keys. Bind with v-model:expanded.
props.isRowExpandable: Predicate used to decide if a row should show the expansion control.
props.pagination: Pagination state. Enables the pagination footer and can be controlled with v-model:pagination.
props.pageSizeOptions: Available page-size options shown in the pagination footer.
props.serverSide: Disables local filtering, sorting and slicing so the parent can fetch server-side data.
props.resizable: Enables column resizing with draggable handles.
props.reorderable: Enables column reordering by drag-and-drop and keyboard shortcuts.
props.columnsState: Controlled column state for width, order and visibility. Bind with v-model:columnsState.
props.state: Aggregate table state snapshot for persisting sort, filters, pagination, columns, search and selection together.
props.minColumnWidth: Minimum width in pixels when resizing columns.
props.virtual: Enables row virtualization for large datasets.
props.rowHeight: Fixed row height used by virtualization. Inferred from size/density when omitted.
props.overscan: Extra virtual rows rendered outside the viewport for smoother scrolling.
props.virtualHeight: Height of the virtual scroll viewport.
props.childrenKey: Property name that contains child rows for tree tables.
props.treeExpanded: Controlled expanded tree row keys. Bind with v-model:treeExpanded.
props.hasChildrenHint: Predicate used with loadChildren to show a chevron before children are loaded.
props.groupBy: Groups rows by a field key or accessor function.
props.groupExpanded: Controlled expanded group keys. Bind with v-model:groupExpanded.
props.stickyFirstColumn: Pins the first data column, optionally only on mobile.
props.globalSearch: Adds global search to the toolbar.
props.globalSearchScope: Controls whether global search scans all columns or only filterable columns.
props.globalSearchTerm: Controlled global search term. Bind with v-model:globalSearchTerm.
props.columnVisibility: Adds a column visibility menu to the toolbar.
props.exportable: Adds CSV, JSON and/or clipboard export actions.
props.exportFileName: Base filename used for downloaded exports.

emits.updateFilter: Emitted when column filter state changes.
emits.updateExpanded: Emitted when row expansion state changes.
emits.updatePagination: Emitted when page or page size changes.
emits.updateColumnsState: Emitted when column widths, order or visibility changes.
emits.updateTreeExpanded: Emitted when tree expansion state changes.
emits.updateGroupExpanded: Emitted when group expansion state changes.
emits.updateGlobalSearchTerm: Emitted when the global search input changes.
emits.rowActivate: Emitted when a row is activated from keyboard interaction.
emits.rowClick: Emitted when a row is clicked.
emits.cellEdit: Emitted when an inline editable cell commits a new value.
emits.cellEditCancel: Emitted when an inline cell edit is cancelled.
emits.updateState: Emitted with the aggregate table state snapshot.

slots.default: Declarative column API using TableColumn children.
slots.caption: Optional table caption for screen readers and visible context.
slots.footer: Custom footer below the table body.
slots.bulkActions: Bulk action area shown when rows are selected.
slots.cellKey: Custom cell renderer for a specific column key, e.g. cell-status.
slots.headerKey: Custom header renderer for a specific column key, e.g. header-status.
slots.filterKey: Custom filter renderer for a specific column key, e.g. filter-status.

basic.title: Basic with rows and columns
basic.desc: A complete example showing how rows are shaped, how columns map to row fields and how row-key identifies each row.

striped.title: Striped + bordered
striped.desc: Alternating rows and full borders for easier reading in dense tables.

sort.title: With sorting
sort.desc: Mark any column as sortable to enable ascending / descending order.

compact.title: Compact density
compact.desc: Reduces vertical padding to show more rows in less space.

stickyHeader.title: Sticky header
stickyHeader.desc: The header stays fixed while scrolling inside the container.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.description: Vertical list of chronological events with dot, icon or outline markers. Each item supports title, description, timestamp and a per-item color.

props.items: Events to render in chronological order.
props.variant: Default marker style. Each item can override it.
props.color: Default semantic color of the marker.
props.size: Visual scale of the marker and typography.
props.side: Side where the marker line is rendered.

slots.itemId: Extra content rendered below the title and description of the item with the corresponding id.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Dot markers with title and timestamp.

icons.title: With icons
icons.desc: Icon markers for richer visual context.

colors.title: Per-item colors
colors.desc: Each event can override the marker color independently.

descriptions.title: With descriptions
descriptions.desc: Add secondary text below each event title.

right.title: Right side
right.desc: Moves the marker line to the right of the content.

typography.title: Typography
typography.description: Typographic system with semantic variants (display, heading, title, body, caption…), sizes and weights. The as prop lets you map to the appropriate HTML tag to maintain accessible hierarchy.

props.variant: Semantic typographic style. Defines the default tag.
props.size: Scale within the variant. Inherited from ModoProvider if omitted.
props.as: Overrides the HTML tag inferred by the variant.
props.color: Semantic color applied to the text.
props.truncate: Truncates with ellipsis to a single line.

variants.title: Variants
variants.desc: Each variant defines a visual hierarchy and a default HTML tag.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Each variant has three scales (small, medium, large).

weights.title: Weights
weights.desc: Six weights available from light to extrabold.

colors.title: Semantic colors
colors.desc: Use provider colors to maintain consistency and accessibility.

truncate.title: Truncate
truncate.desc: Truncates the text to a single line with ellipsis when it exceeds the width.

weekView.title: WeekView
weekView.description: Weekly view with an hourly grid. Supports business hours, disabled ranges, drag & drop and event resizing.

props.modelValue: Visible date. The week is calculated from it.
props.events: Events to render in the hourly grid.
props.locale: BCP-47 locale for headers and formats.
props.color: Semantic color applied to accents.
props.format: Time format for the hour column.
props.slotHeight: Height in px of each time slot.
props.minDayWidth: Minimum width per day column before horizontal scroll.
props.showAllDayRow: Shows the row for all-day events.
props.showNowPill: Shows a pill with the current time over the day column.
props.bordered: Draws a border around the grid.
props.allowRangeSelection: Allows selecting a range by dragging over empty slots.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the visible week changes.
emits.eventDrop: Event dragged to a new position.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Week in 24-hour format with timed events.

allDay.title: With all-day row
allDay.desc: The top row groups all-day and multi-day events.

format12h.title: 12-hour format
format12h.desc: Switches the time format to AM/PM.

businessHours.title: Business hours
businessHours.desc: Highlights business hours and limits the visible time range.
